message:
fix(ci): add frankensqlite checkout to all workflows

Cargo.toml [patch.crates-io] overrides fsqlite with local path
deps at ../frankensqlite/. CI runners don't have this repo,
causing all builds to fail. Add checkout step for frankensqlite
in every job that runs cargo commands.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,12 @@ jobs:
     steps:
       - uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
 
+      - name: Checkout frankensqlite (path dependency)
+        uses: actions/checkout@11bd71901bbe5b1630ceea73d27597364c9af683  # v4.2.2
+        with:
+          repository: Dicklesworthstone/frankensqlite
+          path: ../frankensqlite
+
       - name: Install Rust toolchain
         uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@master
         with:
